last_result.effect: EasyCrypt accepted a proof-state change; the refreshed view is based on the new committed state.
last_result.proof_state: The committed EasyCrypt proof state changed.

source.label: Parsed from EasyCrypt pretty goal text

moves.title: Residual closing tactic
moves.applicability: This tactic-shaped option should be checked with a read-only probe before committing it.
moves.effect: This is a read-only probe; it asks EasyCrypt what would happen without changing the committed proof state.
moves.derivation: read-only probe surfaced from proof-state analysis
moves.guarantee: read-only probe shape; proof state unchanged; probe then decide; reversible

moves.title: Read-only tactic probe
moves.applicability: This tactic-shaped option should be checked with a read-only probe before committing it.
moves.effect: This is a read-only probe; it asks EasyCrypt what would happen without changing the committed proof state.
moves.derivation: read-only probe surfaced from proof-state analysis
moves.guarantee: read-only probe shape; proof state unchanged; probe then decide; reversible

selected_handles.title: Concrete tactic candidate
selected_handles.why_relevant: EasyCrypt reports no remaining goals after the latest tactic; commit `qed.` to save the lemma before final verification.

notes.message: event log says candidate_closed and current EC state is indeterminate

inspect_lookup_handles.effect: All handles here are read-only manager requests; the committed EasyCrypt proof state stays unchanged.
inspect_lookup_handles.manager_note: Some requests may ask EasyCrypt or name resolution; wait for the manager result before choosing the next proof intent.

ask_manager_for.use_when: No fresh recommendation is available; parse the current goal.
ask_manager_for.returns: manager-provided read-only context for this proof route

items.label: Before latest branch-local tactic #40
items.why_checkpoint: latest branch-local step inside the current seq scope
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #40 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: After seq opened / before branch work #15
items.why_checkpoint: seq-local branch boundary; selecting it keeps the seq cut and removes branch-local work after it
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #15 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: Before seq cut #14
items.why_checkpoint: seq-cut boundary; selecting it restores the proof state before this cut was committed
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #14 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: Before inline expansion #19
items.why_checkpoint: inline boundary; selecting it restores the proof state before this expansion
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #19 and every committed tactic after it in this node.
